citations.desc: Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC).
citations.narrative:
During inspection, a group of six pigs were observed interacting and slipping on flooring that appeared wet. These
animals arrived earlier in the day and were socially housed by gender. The enclosure had some straw, but the pigs
appeared to have activated the automatic drinking system and the resulting living conditions did not contribute to their
health and comfort. Facility identified that not all these animals had been previously socially housed together at the
vendor and addressed both the interactions and the wet floor during the inspection. Animals' living conditions will be
appropriate for their species and contribute to their health and comfort in order to ensure their welfare.
Corrected during inspection on 30 April, 2026
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representatives.
n

narrative:
2.31(d)(1)(vi) 
   
Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC). 
During inspection, a group of six pigs were observed interacting and slipping on flooring that appeared wet. These 
animals arrived earlier in the day and were socially housed by gender. The enclosure had some straw, but the pigs 
appeared to have activated the automatic drinking system and the resulting living conditions did not contribute to their 
health and comfort. Facility identified that not all these animals had been previously socially housed together at the 
vendor and addressed both the interactions and the wet floor during the inspection. Animals' living conditions will be 
appropriate for their species and contribute to their health and comfort in order to ensure their welfare. 
 
Corrected during inspection on 30 April, 2026 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representatives.
